howItWorks.title: How AI Review Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A high-level overview of the automated code review pipeline
howItWorks.intro: review-agent is a self-hosted, open-source, multi-provider AI code review agent. When a pull request is opened or updated, it automatically analyses the diff and posts review comments. It is strictly read-only on source files — the only write action is posting PR comments.
howItWorks.entryAriaLabel: Three entry points funneling into the review pipeline
howItWorks.entryActionDesc: Triggered automatically by GitHub Actions on PR open or update.
howItWorks.entryWebhookDesc: Serverless webhook server via AWS Lambda + SQS queue.
howItWorks.entryCliDesc: Command-line interface for local or scripted invocation.
howItWorks.pipelineAriaLabel: Seven-step review pipeline from trigger to PR post
howItWorks.step1Desc: A PR create or update event starts the agent via GitHub Action, Webhook server (Lambda + SQS), or CLI.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The changed diff is parsed file-by-file. Path filters and size limits narrow the review scope.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Related test files, type definitions, and adjacent files are auto-fetched. The review policy (system prompt) is assembled.
howItWorks.step4Desc: The agent explores the repository using three read-only tools — read_file, glob, grep — for up to 20 tool calls. Findings are output as structured JSON via the Vercel AI SDK.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Secret scanning runs before and after the review. PR content and fetched files are treated as untrusted. Prompt injection guards and cost limits are enforced.
howItWorks.step6Desc: Fingerprint-based deduplication and a confidence filter remove noisy or low-confidence findings.
howItWorks.step7Desc: Inline comments and a summary are posted to the PR. Incremental reviews carry forward previous state to suppress re-reported findings.
howItWorks.safetySubtitle: How the agent is kept safe and predictable
howItWorks.safetyReadOnlyDesc: The agent can only call read_file, glob, and grep. It cannot modify source code.
howItWorks.safetyScanDesc: Automated scans run before and after the review pass to detect accidental secret leakage.
howItWorks.safetyBoundaryDesc: PR body and fetched file contents are isolated as untrusted input to prevent data exfiltration.
howItWorks.safetyInjectionDesc: Prompt injection mitigations guard the system prompt against adversarial input in reviewed code.
howItWorks.safetyCostDesc: Per-PR and daily cost caps prevent runaway spending regardless of PR size or frequency.
howItWorks.providersSubtitle: Swap the underlying LLM without changing your review workflow

qualityMetrics.title: Quality Metrics
qualityMetrics.subtitle: Installation · period: {{period}}
qualityMetrics.tooltipAcceptanceRate: Fraction of reviews that resulted in Approve. Approvals ÷ total reviews.
qualityMetrics.tooltipFalsePositiveRate: Fraction of AI comments marked as false positives via 👎 feedback.
qualityMetrics.tooltipCoverageRate: Fraction of diff files that received at least one AI comment.
qualityMetrics.tooltipLatencyP50: Median (P50) review execution wall-clock time. This is end-to-end agent execution time and does not include queue wait time.
qualityMetrics.tooltipLatencyP95: 95th-percentile review execution wall-clock time. This is end-to-end agent execution time and does not include queue wait time.
qualityMetrics.tooltipReviewCount: Total number of reviews executed in the selected period.

costAnalytics.title: Cost Analytics
costAnalytics.subtitle: Installation · period: {{period}}
costAnalytics.budgetAlertBanner: [ALERT] Period cost {{total}} exceeded budget alert threshold {{threshold}}. Notification delivery is pending issue #144.
costAnalytics.tooltipTotalCost: Total LLM cost in USD for all calls in the selected period.
costAnalytics.tooltipCallCount: Number of LLM API calls recorded in the selected period.
costAnalytics.tooltipInputTokens: Total input (prompt) tokens across all LLM calls.
costAnalytics.tooltipOutputTokens: Total output (completion) tokens across all LLM calls.
costAnalytics.tooltipCacheReadTokens: Total prompt cache read tokens (Anthropic cache hit).
costAnalytics.tooltipCacheCreationTokens: Total prompt cache creation tokens (Anthropic cache write).
